input_contract: projected AIV generic IR whose ops all carry modeled semantics (HasModeledOperationSemantics) and whose tensor<*> operands (tensor.empty, tensor.extract_slice/insert_slice, hivm.hir elementwise and DPS ops) one-shot bufferization can lower to memref without aliasing ambiguity; an unreviewed op or ambiguous alias fails closed
bufferized scf.for iter-args and single-point (scalar) HIVM ops; unmodeled iter-arg or non-single-point forms are left in place rather than rewritten
HIVM structured ops with a known decomposition template; unrecognized structured ops pass through unchanged with no extra temporary
memref.collapse_shape/expand_shape over non-contiguous layouts materialize a copy; contiguous reshapes pass through without a copy
local memref allocations without an explicit #hivm.address_space are assigned UB; allocs already carrying a concrete address space are honored as-is

ub_role: change physical UB extents and layouts
input_contract: UB allocations with statically known element shapes and strides; a dynamic stride-aligned allocation fails closed (throw surfaced as a blocker diagnostic, never silently dropped)
subview/collapse_shape chains over UB allocs with consistent operand ranks; a rank mismatch fails closed
HIVM ops declaring a ceil-factor/scratch operand with a valid constant; an invalid ceil-factor operand fails closed
hivm.hir.load -> hivm.hir.copy -> single-use chains fully inside one function; a cross-function copy fails closed
UB buffers eligible for multi-buffering; with the default (auto-multi-buffer off) no buffer is multiplied
finalized UB buffer records with static extents and resolved lifetimes; the projected module must carry exactly one AIV function or planning fails closed
